problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Nanoparticle. Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
